g.title: leaderContract
g.text:
<<core interface>>
LeaderElector
+ runIfLeader(lockName): T?
+ runAsyncIfLeader(lockName)
+ state(lockName): LeaderState

g.title: suspendContract
g.text:
<<core suspend interface>>
SuspendLeaderElector
+ suspend runIfLeader(lockName)
+ runIfLeaderResultSuspend(slot)
coroutine context handle

g.title: groupContract
g.text:
<<core group interface>>
LeaderGroupElector
+ maxLeaders: Int
+ runIfLeader(lockName): T?
+ activeCount / availableSlots

g.title: suspendGroupContract
g.text:
<<core suspend group>>
SuspendLeaderGroupElector
+ maxLeaders: Int
+ suspend runIfLeader(lockName)
+ state(lockName): LeaderGroupState

g.title: mongoLeader
g.text:
<<blocking + async implementation>>
MongoLeaderElector
sync MongoCollection<Document>
creates MongoLock
autoExtend watchdog optional
history recorder optional

g.title: singleDelegates
g.text:
<<renewal delegates>>
Single Extend Delegates
MongoLockExtendDelegate
MongoSuspendLockExtendDelegate
share lock with LeaderLockHandle
classify Mongo backend errors

g.title: history
g.text:
<<optional audit store>>
Mongo History Sink
MongoLeaderHistorySink
collection bluetape4k_leader_history
records ACQUIRED/COMPLETED/FAILED
indexer adds TTL retention index

g.title: mongoGroup
g.text:
<<slot group implementation>>
MongoLeaderGroupElector
sync group collection
randomized slot iteration
slotKey lockName:slot:N
group watchdog disabled

g.title: slotDelegates
g.text:
<<group renewal delegates>>
Slot Extend Delegates
MongoSlotExtendDelegate
MongoSuspendSlotExtendDelegate
extend lockName:slot:N
manual LockExtender path

g.title: mongoSuspendGroup
g.text:
<<coroutine slot group>>
MongoSuspend Group
MongoSuspendLeaderGroupElector
sync collection for state queries
coroutine collection for locks
same namespace required

g.title: dualCollections
g.text:
<<namespace invariant>>
Suspend Group Dual Collections
sync MongoCollection: activeCount/state
CoroutineMongoCollection: acquire/release
collection namespace must match
TTL monitor can lag up to 60 seconds

g.title: mongoLock
g.text:
<<findOneAndUpdate lock>>
MongoLock
token: Base58 fencing value
expired filter + upsert AFTER
E11000 means contended
delete or minLease update

g.title: mongoSuspendLock
g.text:
<<coroutine Mongo lock>>
MongoSuspendLock
coroutine driver retry loop
ensureActive while acquiring
token check before unlock
same extendDetailed contract

g.title: mongoCollections
g.text:
<<TTL document store>>
Mongo Lock Collections
bluetape4k_leader_locks
bluetape4k_leader_group_locks
fields: _id, token, expireAt
TTL index expireAfterSeconds=0

g.title: classifier
g.text:
<<watchdog error policy>>
MongoBackendErrorClassifier
timeout / socket -> transient
not primary / recovering -> transient
auth / write concern -> non-transient
feeds CompositeBackendErrorClassifier
